title: lastrea ochthodes
intro: Lastrea ochthodes, also known as the Indian fern or Himalayan fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lastrea ochthodes include treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and pain. Herbal preparations of Lastrea ochthodes include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness.
